import React from 'react'; import { useQuery } from '@tanstack/react-query'; import { useSelector } from 'react-redux'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; import { dashboardAPI } from '../services/api'; const MOCK = { stats: { total_students:1248, total_employees:87, todayAttendancePercent:94.2, todayCollection:120000, open_enquiries:12 }, notices: [ { id:1, title:'Parent-Teacher Meeting on 12 June 2025', publish_date:'2025-06-05', posted_by:'Principal' }, { id:2, title:'Half-Yearly Exam Schedule Released', publish_date:'2025-06-03', posted_by:'Academic Dept' }, { id:3, title:'Annual Day Preparations Begin', publish_date:'2025-06-01', posted_by:'Event Committee' }, ], recentAdmissions: [ { id:1, first_name:'Ravi', last_name:'Gupta', class_name:'Class 6', section_name:'A', admission_date:'2025-06-06' }, { id:2, first_name:'Sneha', last_name:'Patel', class_name:'Class 9', section_name:'A', admission_date:'2025-06-05' }, { id:3, first_name:'Mohit', last_name:'Singh', class_name:'Class 11',section_name:'', admission_date:'2025-06-04' }, { id:4, first_name:'Anita', last_name:'Rao', class_name:'Class 7', section_name:'B', admission_date:'2025-06-03' }, ], classWiseFees: [ { class_name:'Class 6', collected:76 }, { class_name:'Class 7', collected:88 }, { class_name:'Class 8', collected:92 }, { class_name:'Class 9', collected:71 }, { class_name:'Class 10', collected:95 }, { class_name:'Class 11', collected:68 }, { class_name:'Class 12', collected:84 }, ], }; export default function Dashboard() { const user = useSelector(s => s.auth.user); const navigate = useNavigate(); const { data: apiData, isError, isLoading } = useQuery({ queryKey: ['dashboard'], queryFn: () => dashboardAPI.get().then(r => r.data.data), retry: 1, staleTime: 60000, }); const live = !isError && !isLoading && apiData; const data = live ? apiData : MOCK; const stats = data?.stats || {}; const hour = new Date().getHours(); const greeting = hour < 12 ? 'Good morning' : hour < 17 ? 'Good afternoon' : 'Good evening'; const CARDS = [ { label:'Total Students', value: stats.total_students?.toLocaleString() || '0', icon:'🎓', c:'#7C3AED', bg:'#EDE9FE', path:'/students' }, { label:'Total Employees', value: stats.total_employees || '0', icon:'👥', c:'#059669', bg:'#D1FAE5', path:'/employees' }, { label:"Today's Attendance", value: `${stats.todayAttendancePercent || 0}%`, icon:'✅', c:'#D97706', bg:'#FEF3C7', path:'/attendance'}, { label:"Today's Collection", value: `₹${((stats.todayCollection||0)/1000).toFixed(0)}K`, icon:'💰', c:'#DC2626', bg:'#FEE2E2', path:'/fees'}, ]; return (
{/* Header */}

{greeting}, {user?.fullName?.split(' ')[0] || user?.full_name?.split(' ')[0] || 'Admin'} 👋

{live ? '🟢 Live data' : '🟡 Demo data'} · Academic Year 2025–26 · {new Date().toDateString()}

{/* Stat cards row 1 */}
{CARDS.map(c => (
navigate(c.path)} style={{ background:'#fff', border:'0.5px solid #E5E7EB', borderRadius:14, padding:18, cursor:'pointer', transition:'all .18s' }} onMouseEnter={e => { e.currentTarget.style.transform='translateY(-2px)'; e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow='0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.08)'; }} onMouseLeave={e => { e.currentTarget.style.transform=''; e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow=''; }}>
{c.icon}
{c.value}
{c.label}
))}
{/* Stat cards row 2 */}
{[ { label:'New Admissions', value:28, icon:'📋', sub:'↑ 8 this week', c:'#1E1B4B' }, { label:'Open Enquiries', value:stats.open_enquiries||12, icon:'📞', sub:'4 due today', c:'#0891B2' }, { label:'Books Overdue', value:24, icon:'📚', sub:'↑ 3 this week', c:'#D97706' }, { label:'Active Routes', value:4, icon:'🚌', sub:'248 students', c:'#059669' }, ].map(c => (
{c.icon}
{c.value}
{c.label}
{c.sub}
))}
{/* Chart + Notices */}
{/* Bar Chart */}
📊 Income vs Expense — 2025–26
Income Expense
{/* Notices */}
📢 Notices
{(data?.notices||[]).map((n,i) => (
{n.title}
{n.posted_by} · {new Date(n.publish_date).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')}
))}
{/* Recent Admissions + Quick Actions */}
🆕 Recent Admissions
{['Student','Class','Date','Status'].map(h => )} {(data?.recentAdmissions||[]).map(s => ( ))}
{h}
{s.first_name} {s.last_name} {s.class_name} {s.section_name} {new Date(s.admission_date).toLocaleDateString('en-IN')} Active
⚡ Quick Actions
{[['📋','New Admission','/students'],['💰','Collect Fee','/fees'],['✅','Attendance','/attendance'],['📢','Notice','/notices'], ['👤','Add Staff','/employees'],['📊','Reports','/reports'],['🚌','Transport','/'],['📜','Certificates','/']].map(([icon,label,path]) => (
navigate(path)} style={{ display:'flex', flexDirection:'column', alignItems:'center', gap:6, padding:'12px 4px', background:'#F9FAFB', border:'0.5px solid #E5E7EB', borderRadius:12, cursor:'pointer', transition:'all .15s', textAlign:'center' }} onMouseEnter={e => { e.currentTarget.style.background='#EDE9F8'; e.currentTarget.style.borderColor='#A78BFA'; }} onMouseLeave={e => { e.currentTarget.style.background='#F9FAFB'; e.currentTarget.style.borderColor='#E5E7EB'; }}> {icon} {label}
))}
{/* Class-wise fees */}
📊 Class-wise Fee Collection
{(data?.classWiseFees||[]).map(c => (
{c.class_name}
{c.collected}%
))}
Collected Pending
); }
